name: online-set-multiplayer-game

scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.deploy:cf-worker: npm install --prefix cloudflare/set-game && npm run deploy --prefix cloudflare/set-game

description: Multiplayer Set (Express + WebSocket + Vite). See CLOUDFLARE.md for Cloudflare deploy; npm run build then npm start for a single Node server + static client.
